3: Competitor analysis and trend mining turned into a weekly content plan with hooks, CTAs, formats, and posting times—built to convert.

23: At JP Management, we offer three flexible payment models to suit your needs.
25: You receive a guaranteed weekly salary, paid out regularly regardless of performance.
27: You earn a percentage of the total revenue generated from your content.
29: A combination of both—a smaller fixed weekly salary plus a smaller revenue share.
30: Choose the model that best fits your goals—whether you prefer security, growth potential, or a balanced mix of both.
